name: Apex Pro Racing Goggles
description: Engineered for competitive swimmers. Features ultra-low profile lenses to minimize drag, anti-shatter polycarbonate design, and a double silicone strap system for a secure fit during high-speed dives.
features: FINA approved hydrodynamic design
Advanced anti-fog coating (lasting up to 100+ hours of use)
UV 400 protective mirrored lenses
Interchangeable nose bridges (4 sizes included)
customization: Custom logo printing on strap and custom branded hard-case packaging.

name: Comfort-Fit Club Goggles
description: Designed for hotel pools and training centers. Offers a wide 180-degree panoramic field of vision and an extra-soft liquid silicone gasket that eliminates eye fatigue and pressure rings.
features: 180-degree wide panoramic lenses
Ultra-soft hypoallergenic silicone seal
Quick-adjust side buckle system
Scratch-resistant outer lens coating

specifications.Packaging: Standard Eco-friendly polybag or blister pack

customization: OEM color matching (Pantone) and pad-printed brand logo on frame.

name: Optical Corrective Swim Goggles
description: Customized prescription swim goggles for commercial clubs and distribution. Features individually selected diopter lenses to provide near-perfect underwater vision for nearsighted swimmers.
features: Available in diopters from -1.5 to -8.0
Symmetrical lens design for easy lens replacement
Leak-proof double-layered silicone skirt
Split headstrap for balanced tension

specifications.Lens Coating: Dual-sided anti-fog and hard-coat scratch resistant

customization: Wholesale prescription kits with counter-top acrylic display stands.

name: Junior Safe-Swim Goggles
description: A highly durable, kid-friendly goggle designed specifically for schools and water park retail shops. Features a single-piece flexible frame that withstands heavy bending and rough handling.
features: Flex-frame technology for impact resistance
Easy-adjust rear push button buckle for kids
Safe, non-toxic food-grade silicone components
Bright, high-visibility dual-tone frames
customization: Custom cartoon character prints on strap and custom colorway options.

name: Pro-Silicone 3D Racing Cap
description: An aerodynamic, wrinkle-free 3D molded swim cap engineered for elite swimmers. Its variable thickness design reduces drag and maintains its shape throughout high-impact races.
features: Wrinkle-free 3D molded shape for reduced hydrodynamic drag
Thicker central band to maintain dome structure
Non-slip interior grip texture
100% hypoallergenic premium silicone
customization: High-definition multi-color screen printing with custom team logos.

name: Classic Latex Swim Cap
description: The budget-friendly choice for swimming schools and bulk camp orders. Lightweight, breathable, and highly elastic, featuring a ribbed edge that prevents the cap from sliding up.
features: Cost-effective bulk solution for swimming academies
Highly elastic latex material for easy fit
Ribbed edge band prevents roll-up
Talcom-coated interior for easy wear
customization: Single-color silk screen logo printing.

name: Custom Team Silicone Cap
description: Standard institutional swim cap designed for long-lasting pool use. Ideal for swim teams, schools, and promotional items. Excellent resistance to chlorine degradation and color fading.
features: Highly resistant to chlorine and UV exposure
Thick, durable silicone structure (55g)
Highly stretchable, fits most head sizes comfortably
Smooth outer surface optimized for clean branding

specifications.Packaging: Individual zip-lock pouch with insert card

customization: Dual-sided customized graphics, full-bleed color options, individual name printing.

name: Thermal Neoprene Swim Cap
description: Designed for open water swimming and winter training. Features a 3mm high-grade neoprene lining that traps heat and a chin-strap system to keep the cap fully secured in rough ocean waters.
features: 3mm Yamamoto neoprene for superior insulation
Glued and blind-stitched (GBS) seams prevent water flushing
Adjustable velcro hook-and-loop chin strap
High-visibility panels for safety in open water
customization: Strap branding and customized high-vis color combinations.

name: IPX8 Floating Phone Pouch
description: Premium waterproof mobile pouch for water parks and hotels. Built-in air padding allows the phone to float safely on water, preventing lost devices in deep pools and lazy rivers.
features: IPX8 certified up to 30 meters depth
Air-cushion border for reliable floating capacity
Highly transparent touch-sensitive TPU window
Secure dual-latch snap-and-lock mechanism

specifications.Floatation Limit: Floats devices weighing up to 280 grams

customization: Brand logo printed on the lock bar and custom colored lanyards.

name: Active Swimmer Armband Case
description: Ergonomic waterproof armband cover engineered for swimming training, paddleboarding, and water sports. Features a secure, comfortable neoprene armband that stays locked on the upper arm.
features: IPX8 certified waterproof housing
Breathable, adjustable neoprene armband with velcro closure
Audio-jack pass-through option (optional config)
Scratch-proof and clear camera window on the back
customization: Custom branding on velcro strap and custom strap sizing options.

name: Heavy-Duty Tablet Dry Cover
description: Large format IPX8 waterproof sleeve designed for tablets and commercial handheld scanners. Widely used by water park staff, lifeguards, and luxury hotel poolside reception desks.
features: Extra-large sizing to fit tablets up to 11.5 inches
Reinforced corners for drop protection
Rear hand strap for secure single-hand operations
High-clarity optical lens window for rear cameras
customization: Corporate color matching, logo hot-stamping, and custom strap designs.

name: RFID Waterproof Silicone Wristband
description: Durable, waterproof RFID wristbands for modern keyless lockers and cashless payment systems in water parks and resorts. Molded from premium silicone for long-term skin comfort.
features: 100% waterproof and dustproof (IP68)
Available with HF, LF, and UHF RFID chips
Custom laser-etched serial numbers and barcodes
Flexible, stretchable design fits all wrist sizes
customization: Logo embossing, debossing, color-filling, laser printing, and chip programming.

name: Commercial Slide Tube Repair Kit
description: Professional-grade repair kits containing heavy-duty PVC patches and high-strength polyurethane adhesive. Specifically formulated to repair water slides, rafts, and inflatables under constant water exposure.
features: Marine-grade polyurethane adhesive with rapid curing
Thick 1000D reinforced PVC patches (matching slide tube fabrics)
Complete kit with rollers, sandpaper, and solvents
Highly resistant to heat, chlorine, and UV

specifications.Curing Time: Tack-free in 10 mins, full cure in 24 hours

customization: Private labeling on adhesive tubes and custom branded instruction manuals.

name: Commercial Adult Safety Vest
description: High-buoyancy commercial safety vest designed for rental in water parks, lakes, and resorts. Built with heavy-duty 200D nylon and closed-cell EPE foam to withstand multi-season daily use.
features: Heavy-duty triple-buckle front adjustment closure
Reinforced shoulder seams and box-stitched straps
Open-side design for comfortable multi-size fit
FINA style high-visibility safety orange
customization: Bold screen-printed facility logo on back and custom property tracking serial numbers.

name: Commercial Junior Safety Vest
description: Safety-first flotation vest designed for children in water parks and hotel pools. Features a critical under-crotch safety strap to prevent the vest from riding up or slipping off in water.
features: Double front chest buckles + adjustable crotch strap
Over-shoulder reflective SOLAS tape for night visibility
Integrated emergency whistle attachment
Bright neon-yellow panels for instant lifeguard spotting

specifications.Certifications: CE ISO 12402-5, USCG Type III Equivalent

customization: Facility name screen printing on chest panel, custom safety warning tag prints.

name: Stainless Steel Pool Ladder (Premium)
description: Structural Grade 316 stainless steel ladder engineered for heavy commercial pools and marine environments. Features anti-slip textured steps and dual-anchor base plates.
features: Grade 316 stainless steel for maximum corrosion resistance
Textured safety tread steps prevent slipping
Includes rubber bumpers and floor escutcheons
Heavy-wall tubing (1.5mm thickness) prevents flexing

specifications.Weight Capacity: Tested up to 180 kg static load

customization: Custom height and step-width configurations to match pre-existing anchor points.

name: Anti-Wave Racing Lane Rope
description: World-class hydrodynamic lane ropes designed to dissipate wave energy and keep water calm in competitive racing environments. Engineered according to FINA standards.
features: Wave-damping rotating disc design (150mm diameter)
Heavy-duty marine grade stainless steel tension reel
Super-strong vinyl-coated stainless steel cable core
Color configurations compliant with FINA lanes regulations
customization: Custom color sequence selection (red, blue, white, yellow, green) for lane sections.

name: Elite Competition Starting Block
description: FINA compliant professional starting platform featuring a heavy-duty fiberglass top with an adjustable kick-start plate, non-slip sand grit texture, and internal cabling slots for timing sensors.
features: Adjustable 5-position track-start footrest
Aggressive non-slip platform coating
Corrosion-proof heavy duty 316 stainless steel frame
Compatible with major timing plate brands (Omega/Colorado)
customization: Custom base powder coating colors and platform numbering stencil (1 to 10).

name: Industrial Pool Robot Vacuum
description: Heavy-duty commercial robotic pool cleaner designed for large public pools up to 50 meters. Features dual-active brushing, smart gyroscope navigation, and a high-capacity fine filtration system.
features: Intelligent spatial mapping and gyroscope pathing
Dual drive motors and triple-active scrubbing brushes
Top-access, high-capacity dual-stage filter canister
Includes remote control and robust caddy cart
customization: Extended warranty packages and bulk filter cartridge supply contracts.

name: Institutional EVA Kickboard
description: Heavy-duty, high-density EVA foam kickboard designed for swimming lessons. The ergonomic curved grip handles encourage proper alignment, while the rigid foam ensures zero flexing.
features: Closed-cell EVA foam prevents water logging and mold
Integrated dual grip cutouts for training versatility
High rigidity to maintain horizontal body profile
Skin-friendly smooth finish prevents chafing
customization: Laser engraved or screen printed logos, custom multi-layered color panels.

name: Pro-Contour Foam Pull Buoy
description: Designed for target arm training. The contoured shape fits comfortably between the thighs to immobilize leg kicking, elevating the hips and lower body to optimize stroke training.
features: Contoured design provides secure grip and comfortable fit
Premium EVA foam resists flaking and peeling
High buoyancy elevates hips to correct body position
Abrasive-free skin friendly surface
customization: Debossed logo branding on foam surface, custom thickness levels.

name: Short-Blade Training Fins
description: Short blade training fins built with 100% natural soft rubber. Engineered to increase leg kick tempo and resistance without overloading calf muscles. Ideal for training academies.
features: Short blade design promotes faster, tighter flutter kicks
Super-soft foot pocket prevents ankle blisters and cramping
Textured sole provides grip on pool walls and wet deck
Reinforced side rails for structural blade stiffness

specifications.Sizing: Full range from EU 30 to 48 (color-coded by size)

customization: Custom size-chart printing inside foot pocket, brand logo molded on top blade.

name: Stationary Swim Resistance Belt
description: Stationary swimming resistance harness designed for backyard hotel pools or elite lane training. Features a heavy-duty latex bungee cord and a padded, adjustable waist belt.
features: High-stretch natural latex tubing with safety sleeve protection
Padded neoprene waist belt with secure buckle (fits up to 110cm)
Heavy duty stainless steel carabiners and mounting strap
Provides steady drag without snapping back violently

specifications.Tensile Rating: Tested to withstand up to 120 kg pull force

customization: Custom length bungees and branded carrying bags (microfiber mesh).

name: 500D PVC Dry Bag (20L)
description: Rugged, heavy-duty roll-top waterproof bag built for marine environments and outdoor sports. Made from thick 500D PVC tarpaulin with high-frequency welded seams.
features: 500D PVC Tarpaulin with high-frequency welded seams
IPX6 rated roll-top closure system (3 folds to seal)
Adjustable, detachable double shoulder straps (backpack style)
Reinforced heavy-duty D-rings and buckle locks
customization: All-over custom screen printing, color-matching, custom pocket additions.

name: Quick-Dry Microfiber Sports Towel
description: Ultra-absorbent, ultra-compact microfiber towel designed for institutional swim squads and hotel gift shops. Absorbs up to 4x its weight in water and dries 3x faster than cotton.
features: High-density weave absorbs water instantly
Anti-bacterial silver-ion treatment prevents mold odor
Compact roll-up design with snap-button hanging loop
Lint-free and durable through 200+ washing cycles
customization: Embossed/debossed brand logo in corner, custom dye colors, and branded storage mesh pouch.

name: Elite Ear Plugs & Nose Clip Set
description: Ergonomically designed swim safety kit. Features highly flexible silicone earplugs that block water entry and a secure-grip nose clip with soft pads to prevent water inhalation.
features: Three-tier tree structure earplugs fit canal safely
High-flexibility plastic nose bridge holds shape
Hypoallergenic soft silicone pads prevent nose irritation
Includes premium compact PP storage case
customization: Custom pad-print logo on the lid of the storage case, color-matching components.

name: Single Commercial Slide Tube
description: Heavy-duty single rider water slide tube designed for intensive use in major theme parks. Constructed from premium heavy-gauge PVC with reinforced radio-frequency welded gussets.
features: 0.75mm heavy-gauge cold-crack resistant PVC
Two heavy-duty solid molded handles for secure passenger grip
High-flow Boston valve for rapid inflation/deflation
Reinforced overlap welded seams for extreme durability

specifications.Material: 0.75mm heavy-duty K80 PVC (Cold and UV resistant)

customization: Full color custom branding, safety warning print translations, custom tube sizing.

name: Double Commercial Slide Tube
description: Premium dual-rider commercial water tube designed for high-throughput double slide attractions. Engineered with heavy-duty handles and center gussets to support two riders safely.
features: Heavy-duty 0.90mm PVC construction for high-wear areas
Four ergonomic heavy-duty solid handles
Dual chamber configuration for secondary float safety
Reinforced wear-strips on the bottom sides
customization: Color blocking matching park theme, custom warning graphics, logo branding.

name: 4-Person Commercial Slide Raft
description: High-capacity commercial slide raft designed for major family water park rides. Handcrafted with heavy-duty 1100D polyester reinforced PVC and robust rubbing strakes.
features: 1000 Denier polyester mesh core sandwiched in double PVC layers
Heavy-duty wrap-around rubbing strake for impact protection
8 solid-core molded grab handles + perimeter safety rope
Inflatable self-bailing floor for stability and rapid draining
customization: Park logo on side panels, custom color schemes, customized rope lines.

name: Lazy River Commercial Lounger
description: Premium luxury lounger designed specifically for hotel and resort lazy rivers. Includes a comfortable integrated mesh bottom, high backrest, and molded cup holder.
features: Durable PVC construction with comfortable vinyl mesh floor
Integrated cup holder and high-profile backrest cushion
Heavy-duty handle set for stable lounging in water currents
Chlorine and salt-water resistant materials
customization: Custom resort logo printing, cup holder sizing, custom mesh colors.
